MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

RECITALS

This MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is entered into as of 2022-10-13 ("Effective Date") by and between Dynamo Ventures Corp. ("Client"), a limited liability company duly organised under applicable law, and Apex Capital Holdings LLC ("Provider"), a corporation duly organised under applicable law. This Agreement is prepared with the assistance of Latham & Watkins LLP.

1. TERM

The term of this Agreement commences on 2022-10-13 and shall continue in full force and effect until 2025-10-12 ("Expiration Date"), unless sooner terminated in accordance with the provisions hereof.

2. FEES AND PAYMENT

In consideration for the services rendered hereunder, Client shall pay Provider a monthly retainer fee of $48,000.00 USD, due on the first business day of each calendar month. A one-time onboarding fee of $9,500.00 is payable upon execution of this Agreement. The total estimated contract value is $576,000.00 USD for the initial term. Invoices not paid within thirty (30) days shall accrue a late payment fee of $700.00 per month.

3. SCOPE OF SERVICES

Provider agrees to deliver professional services as mutually agreed upon in writing from time to time by the parties. Provider shall assign qualified personnel with the relevant expertise to perform all services. Any additional services outside the scope hereof shall be separately scoped and priced.

4. TERMINATION

4.1 Termination for Convenience. This Agreement may be cancelled by either party upon ninety (90) days advance written notice.

4.2 Termination for Cause. Either party may terminate this Agreement immediately upon written notice if the other party materially breaches this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) days after receiving written notice thereof. Upon expiration or termination, all outstanding payment obligations shall become immediately due and payable.

5. CONFIDENTIALITY

Each party agrees to hold all Confidential Information of the other party in strict confidence and not to disclose such information to any third party without prior written consent. This obligation of confidentiality shall survive termination or expiration of this Agreement for a period of five (5) years.

6. GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any dispute arising hereunder shall be submitted to binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

SIGNATURE

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of October 11, 2022.
